title: WorkQue_Reject Statement
parameters:
WorkQueNum	Integer expression (1 - 16) that specifies the work queue number.

rejectDistance	Optional when being executed from the command window.  Real expression specifying the minimum distance between parts allowed in the queue in millimeters.  If omitted, the current rejectDistance is displayed.
description:
Use WorkQue_Reject to specify the miminum distance between parts to prevent double registration of the point data.  The work queue cannot be registered when the point data less than the minimum distance is registered by WorkQue_Add.  WorkQue_Reject helps the system filter out double registration.  The default is 0 mm.

WorkQue_Reject should be executed before adding the work queue data (point data and user data) by WorkQue_Add.

Double registeration prevention can be set for each work queue.
see_also:
Sets and displays the minimum distance for double registeration prevention to the specified work queue.

WorkQue_Add

WorkQue_Reject Function

WorkQue_Reject Example

WorkQue_Reject 1, 2.5
